title: ResourceTree — generic hierarchical tree primitive + WorkItemsTree preset (28-feature roadmap)
scope: WorkItemsTree is refactored into two layers: a generic <ResourceTree> primitive that accepts five prop sets (Data types, UI scaffold, Feature requirements, Cog menu, Colour overrides) and a thin WorkItemsTree preset wrapper that passes the work-items configuration. The five prop-set configs are registered in the addressables registry (PLA-0005) under stable addresses such as samantha.work-items._tree.workitems. Future adopters (PortfolioItemsTree, TopologyTree, etc.) get all 28 features for free by passing their own prop sets. The 28 features from R042 §0.B are implemented in ranked order across work streams.
value: The current WorkItemsTree has 14 ❌ missing features, 4 📦 stubbed features (fake sprint, owner, due-date columns), and 2 🚧 partial features from the R042 feature matrix — covering only inline-edit, server-sort on id only, and ad-hoc realtime. Users see synthetic data in three columns. DnD rank code exists but is parked in reference/dnd_tree.tsx and not wired. This plan delivers the full feature set in importance order, with ResourceTree as a reusable primitive so every future tree view inherits the complete capability stack including realtime sync, RBAC-gated columns, URL deep-linking, streaming skeletons, and mobile responsive layout — features Rally never had.
implementation_plan: <s>WS1-A: Extract ResourceTree.tsx from WorkItemsTree.tsx — generic component accepting Sets 1–5 props; WorkItemsTree becomes a preset wrapper passing the work-items config; register 5 prop-set addresses in addressables registry</s> ✓

WS1-B: Restore DnD rank from reference/dnd_tree.tsx; wire useResourceRank + applyDrop + snapshot rollback into ResourceTree; add PATCH /api/work-items/:id/rank { before_id?, after_id? } backend handler
WS2-A: Replace stub filter chips with controlled chip rows in WorkItemsTree props; thread filter state into URL via PLA-0018 nuqs params; backend: append ?type=&status=&assignee= to list query
WS2-B: Promote sort to URL query param + server ORDER BY on all sortable columns; remove client-window sort branches from WorkItemsTree
WS3-A: Add useKeyboardGrid hook on ResourceTree root — Tab → next editable cell, Enter → next row same column, Esc cancels active edit
WS3-B: Add leading checkbox column behind { selection: { mode: 'multi' } }; expose selectedIds + onSelectionChange from ResourceTree
WS3-C: Build <BulkActionBar> rendered when selectedIds.size > 0; wire to POST /api/work-items/bulk { ids, op, payload }; permission-gate each action via useHasPermission
WS4-A: Replace sprintAlias() FAKE with real sprints join in work-items list query; render sprint alias in Sprint column
WS4-B: Replace ownerGlyph() FAKE with real users join on owner_id; render <OwnerChip user={r.owner} /> with avatar + name
WS4-C: Migration — add due_date DATE NULL to work_items; wire inline date editor via ResourceTree Set 1 fetcher
WS5-A: Build <ColumnPicker> flyout; persist visibility map to user_preferences table per { pageId, slot }; driven by ResourceTree Set 2 columns[] config
WS5-B: Column locking — add { key, locked: 'left' } column flag; render with position: sticky on locked cells; ResourceTree Set 2 prop
WS5-C: Column reorder via @dnd-kit sortable on header row; persist order to user_preferences; ResourceTree Set 2 prop
WS5-D: Multi-column sort — promote sort to { field, dir }[] array; URL: ?sort=field1:asc,field2:desc; ResourceTree Set 3 prop
WS6-A: Virtual scroll — adopt @tanstack/react-virtual when row count > 500; ResourceTree Set 3 { virtual: { threshold: 500 } } prop
WS6-B: Row context menu — add onContextMenu handler on each row showing the cog-menu items (Set 4) at cursor position
WS7-A: Tags + custom fields — migration: add tags TEXT[] + custom_fields JSONB to work_items; render chip cell with autocomplete from workspace tag dictionary
WS7-B: Group summaries — ResourceTree Set 3 { grouping: { by, summaries: [{ col, agg }] } }; server returns one summary row per group via Postgres aggregation
WS8-A: Bake useRefetchOnPush(rankTopic(resourceType, parentId)) into ResourceTree driven by Set 1 resourceType; remove ad-hoc adopter wiring
WS8-B: Permission-gated columns and actions — per-column { requires: 'permission.code' } in Set 1 columns consumed via useHasPermission; per-action requires in Set 4
WS8-C: Full URL-encoded tree state — encode { openIds, sort, filters, selection, columnOrder } into search params via PLA-0018 nuqs; extends current partial URL state
WS9-A: CSV export — GET /api/work-items.csv?…filters streamed from Postgres COPY TO STDOUT; permission-checked at route; cog-menu action
WS9-B: Cross-parent DnD reparent — drop on a different parent row → PATCH /api/work-items/:id { parent_id } + rank recompute; ResourceTree Set 3 { dnd: { allowReparent: true } }
WS9-C: Saved views (two-layer) — Layer A always-on in-memory + cookie; Layer B explicit Save View → user_view_state(user_id, address, name); addressable via Samantha
WS10-A: Keyboard new-item create — sentinel last row when Set 3 { canCreate: true }; Enter on empty row → POST /api/work-items; optimistic insert with realtime echo dedup
WS10-B: Copy URL cog action — navigator.clipboard.writeText(rowDeepLink(r)); deep-link URL is canonical via PLA-0018
WS10-C: Mobile responsive collapse — at < 720px swap row template to card layout (Set 2 alt scaffold: 'card'); same data, different scaffold per viewport
WS10-D: Streaming skeleton — wrap ResourceTree fetch in <Suspense fallback={<TreeSkeleton/>}>; server-stream the first page via Next.js App Router
areas_impacted: app/components/WorkItemsTree.tsx — refactored to preset wrapper (thin config file)
app/components/BulkActionBar.tsx (new) — bulk-action overlay rendered above ResourceTree
app/components/OwnerChip.tsx (new) — avatar + name chip for owner column
app/hooks/useGridClipboard.ts (new) — in-app cell clipboard + paste import
backend/internal/workitems/ — add sprint/owner joins, server-sort on all columns, tags/custom_fields, due_date, CSV endpoint, bulk endpoint, rank PATCH
db/schema/ — migrations: due_date, tags, custom_fields on work_items; user_view_state table (new)
app/lib/addressables/ — register 5 prop-set configs for samantha.work-items._tree.workitems
feature_list: #1 DnD rank within parent (useResourceRank + applyDrop, server fractional index API)
#2 Filter chips — Type / Status / Assignee (controlled, URL-threaded)
#3 Server-sort on every column (?sort=col:dir)
#4 Keyboard nav (Tab/Enter cell traversal via useKeyboardGrid)
#5 Multi-select checkbox column + selectedIds
#6 Bulk-action toolbar + POST /api/work-items/bulk
#7 Sprint column real (sprints join)
#8 Owner column real (users join + OwnerChip)
#9 Due date real (due_date migration + inline date editor)
#10 Column visibility picker (ColumnPicker + user_preferences persist)
#11 Column locking — pin Title left (sticky CSS)
#12 Column reorder (header @dnd-kit + user_preferences persist)
#13 Multi-column sort (sorters array + URL)
#14 Virtual scroll (@tanstack/react-virtual at 500 row threshold)
#15 Row context menu reusing cog-menu items (Set 4)
#16 Tags + custom fields (tags TEXT[] + custom_fields JSONB + chip cell)
#17 Group summaries (Postgres aggregation, server summary row per group)
#18 Realtime updates baked into ResourceTree (useRefetchOnPush)
#19 Permission-gated columns and actions (useHasPermission per column/action)
#20 URL-encoded tree state (openIds + sort + filters + selection + columnOrder)
#21 CSV export (GET /api/work-items.csv COPY TO STDOUT streamed)
#22 Cross-parent DnD reparent (PATCH parent_id + rank recompute)
#23 Saved views two-layer (cookie always-on + user_view_state named profile)
#24 Keyboard new-item create (sentinel row + Enter → POST)
#25 Copy URL to row (navigator.clipboard cog action)
#26 Mobile responsive card layout (< 720px scaffold swap)
#27 Streaming skeleton via Suspense (Next.js App Router first-page stream)
#28 Clipboard paste import (useGridClipboard hook + bulk endpoint)
features_extended: PLA-0005 addressables — 5 prop-set configs registered as stable addresses
PLA-0015 <Table> — ResourceTree is a separate primitive; Table tree mode (PLA-0017) coexists; ResourceTree handles unlimited-depth hierarchical data with DnD rank
PLA-0018 deep-linking — URL-encoded tree state extends nuqs params to cover openIds + columnOrder
PLA-0007 RBAC — per-column and per-action permission gates via useHasPermission

risks: RISK-HIGH: DnD rank restore — reference/dnd_tree.tsx (1195 lines from b0d8e4a) may have diverged from current WorkItemsTree structure; read both before integrating
RISK-MED: ResourceTree prop-set extraction is a big refactor of WorkItemsTree.tsx — do it in one focused PR; avoid incremental partial states that break the existing tree
RISK-MED: @tanstack/react-virtual (WS6-A) + @dnd-kit sortable (WS5-C) interact via scrollable container; the virtualised scroll root must be the DnD container — test with 500+ rows before shipping
RISK-LOW: user_view_state table (new) requires migration + service layer; follow polymorphic FK pattern if linking to addressables
RISK-LOW: CSV COPY TO STDOUT streaming requires http.Flusher in the Go handler — standard pattern but test with large datasets

work_item_backlog_roadmap: <s>WS1-A: Extract ResourceTree + register prop sets in addressables</s> ✓
WS2-B: Promote sort to URL + server ORDER BY all columns
WS7-A: Tags + custom fields migration + chip cell
acceptance_criteria_existing: WorkItemsTree renders via ResourceTree with identical visual output — no regression in existing tree behaviour
DnD rank: dragging a row within a parent sends PATCH /api/work-items/:id/rank and the row stays in its new position after refresh
Filter chips: selecting a Type chip appends ?type=story to the URL and the list updates without client-side filtering
Sort: clicking any column header appends ?sort=col:asc to the URL and the backend returns rows in that order
Sprint and Owner columns show real data — no 'S-' prefix from UUID hex, no 2-char monogram from UUID
Due date column shows real dates from work_items.due_date; inline date editor saves to the column
Multi-select: checking 3 rows shows BulkActionBar; bulk-archive sends POST /api/work-items/bulk and all 3 rows disappear
<s>ResourceTree address samantha.work-items._tree.workitems resolves in the addressables registry</s> ✓
go test ./... passes; npm run build succeeds; lint:addressables passes
